title: microlepia marginata
intro: Microlepia marginata is a type of fern plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Microlepia marginata include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for wound healing and skin issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Microlepia marginata is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
